Marisol's pressure voice shifts to labor/body-grounded precision (hot press, bleach in throat, forearm pain, rinse-cycle pressure, sulfur/bleach carryover), reducing mirrored imperative-coaching syntax across the two calls.

Preserved all required transfer facts (amounts, timings, IDs, pending/cleared state) while breaking ledger-template repetition with pressure-bearing counterbeats and varied sentence architecture across the call, text, and notebook sequences. Theo exchange no longer stacks adjacent metadata-only lines; emotional leverage is reintroduced without reducing economic specificity.
